name: Super Mario
description: Plumbing adventures, power-ups, and the Mushroom Kingdom

questions.q: Who designed the character of Mario?

source.notes: Miyamoto first created Mario as 'Jumpman' in Donkey Kong (1981).

questions.q: What was Mario originally called in Donkey Kong (1981)?

source.notes: Renamed after Nintendo's warehouse landlord, Mario Segale.

questions.q: What was Mario's original profession in Donkey Kong?

source.notes: He became a plumber in 'Mario Bros.' (1983) to fit the underground setting.

questions.q: What is the name of Mario's brother?

source.notes: Debuted in 'Mario Bros.' (1983). Named after a pizzeria ('Mario and Luigi's').

questions.q: What kingdom do Mario and Princess Peach call home?

source.notes: Ruled by Princess Peach Toadstool. Populated by Toads (Mushroom People).

questions.q: Who is Mario's perennial villain and main antagonist?

source.notes: King of the Koopas. Japanese name: Daimaō Kuppa (Great Demon King Koopa).

questions.q: What power-up makes Mario grow larger in 'Super Mario Bros.'?

source.notes: First introduced in 'Super Mario Bros.' (1985). Red with white spots.

questions.q: What power-up lets Mario throw fireballs?

source.notes: Mario turns red and white while holding it. Introduced in 'Super Mario Bros.' (1985).

questions.q: What rideable green dinosaur appears in 'Super Mario World' (1990)?

source.notes: Full name: Yoshi (pluralized as 'Yoshis' not 'Yoshies'). T. Yoshisaur Munchakoopas.

questions.q: In 'Super Mario 64' (1996), how many Power Stars are needed to complete the game?

source.notes: 70 unlocks Bowser's final battle. 120 total available for completionists.

questions.q: What is the name of Bowser's son, who constantly tries to kidnap Peach for his father?

source.notes: Debuted in 'Super Mario Sunshine' (2002). Has an airship-shaped handkerchief.

questions.q: What is the name of Peach's chief guardian Toad who often assists Mario?

source.notes: Elder Toad with a grey mushroom cap, moustache, and glasses.

questions.q: In 'Super Mario Odyssey,' Mario travels with a sentient hat named what?

source.notes: Mario uses Cappy to 'capture' creatures, temporarily possessing them.

questions.q: In 'Super Mario Odyssey,' what city modeled after New York City does Mario visit?

source.notes: Mayor Pauline is Mario's damsel-in-distress from the original Donkey Kong.

questions.q: What is the typical shape of the crystalline currency in Mario games?

source.notes: Collect 100 coins for an extra life in most games.

questions.q: What is the yellow-colored Mario's rival/counterpart character introduced in Super Mario Land 2?

source.notes: Debuted 1992. Name is a portmanteau of 'warui' (bad) and 'Mario.'

questions.q: In Super Mario Bros., the level design follows which structure?

source.notes: 32 total levels. Each world ends with a castle battle against Bowser (or a fake).

questions.q: What are the small mushroom people (like Toad) called as a group?

source.notes: Inhabitants of the Mushroom Kingdom. The famous one is simply called 'Toad.'

questions.q: In the 2023 film 'The Super Mario Bros. Movie,' who voices Mario?

source.notes: Controversial casting. Jack Black voiced Bowser, Charlie Day voiced Luigi.

questions.q: What year was the original 'Super Mario Bros.' released for the NES?

source.notes: September 13, 1985 in Japan. Revived the video game industry after the 1983 crash.
